task_description: Spec/design consult for The Rullet mono mobile redesign. worker-2 acts as Retention UX Specialist and defines repeat-use journey, KPI guardrails, and edge states first. worker-3 acts as Apps-in-Toss Monetization Specialist and documents no-ad or retention-safe monetization guardrails first. worker-1 then acts as Toss Miniapp UI Designer and converts those approved guardrails into Compose/Draw/Result screen specs + mono component mapping. Output one aligned spec package only; no implementation.
staffing_summary: designer x1 (primary delivery lane, medium reasoning); test-engineer x1 (verification + regression lane, medium reasoning); designer x1 (specialist support lane, medium reasoning)
